calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Paul K. Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Silverview Terrace Homeowners Association.
Gabriele Redick, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Geary Lee Brown or Shirley A. Brown.
Defaults were entered against defendants on October 23, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 6, 2009.

Exhibit--1---Bay West Property Management Statement, dated 1/7/10--------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Silverview Terrace Homeowners Association, and against the Defaulted Defendants Geary Lee Brown and Shirley A. Brown as follows:

Damages/Principal - $9,285.63.

Total - $9,285.63.

It is further Ordered that the right, claims, ownership, liens, titles and demand of defendants are subject, subsequent and subordinate to plaintiff's claim of lien. Additionally, plaintiff's assessment lien is foreclosed, and sale of the subject real property (described in Exhibit A of the Judgment) by the Sheriff of San Francisco County is hereby Ordered. Lastly, the proceeds of the sale shall be applied to the amounts due to plaintiff, including attorney's fees and costs. The issue of attorney fees incurred post-judgment is reserved.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Continued To Feb-10-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
